# Feature Plan

Use `AGENTS.md` as the repository rule source.
Use `.agents/skills/orchestrator-feature-lead/SKILL.md`.
Follow `.agents/workflows/feature-lifecycle.md`, `branch-isolation.md`, and `handoff-contract.md`.
